stimulus.title: Feed Ts Lease Fault Matrix case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review TypeScript team handles case 1903 during a PostgreSQL lease and migration fault exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove short SKIP LOCKED claims, fenced tokens, affected-row finalize, fairness, and lease faults; failed, canceled, stale, and cross-tenant work must preserve the prior admitted state; then change one PostgreSQL constraint, transaction, migration, upsert, query, or search plan and preserve admitted state. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Test crash, timeout, heartbeat loss, duplicate claim, connection loss, cancellation, stale completion, and database recovery.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: SKIP LOCKED prevents every duplicate or lost job.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test crash, timeout, heartbeat loss, duplicate claim, connection loss, cancellation, stale completion, and database recovery. Artifact under review: fenced PostgreSQL fetch-claim protocol.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, cast one convenient XML object as a feed, omit reader and publisher outcomes, source and emitted revision, discovery and SSRF scope, Atom and namespace cases, entity and dangerous-key limits, unknown runtime validation, Fetch stream and AbortSignal ownership, PostgreSQL client, Promise settlement, tenant, accessibility, recovery, and controlled Node transfer, then accept plausible objects as feed-service proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Feed Ts Lease Fault Matrix, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test crash, timeout, heartbeat loss, duplicate claim, connection loss, cancellation, stale completion, and database recovery.
